title: diplotaxis virgata subsp. brachycarpa
intro: Diplotaxis virgata subsp. brachycarpa, also known as a type of wild rocket or annual rocket, is a perennial plant in the Brassicaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant. The plant's health benefits include its potential to protect against oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestion. Diplotaxis virgata subsp. brachycarpa is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
